headline: PFG Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y, Dividend Up
summary: PFG beats Q1 EPS estimates, with profit surging on strong fee income and AUM growth, even as revenues decline year over year.

headline: FAF Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates on Commercial Strength
